## Key Macro Themes

1. **Iran War Oil Supply Shock (Primary Theme):** Israeli strikes on Iranian oil facilities (March 8, 2026) have created a confirmed supply disruption with WTI at $103+. Trump's March 9 update on Iran and higher gas prices signals this is not a short-term event. Goldman Sachs has warned oil could reach $150-200/barrel. This theme is the highest-conviction catalyst for CL (STRONG_BULLISH +5) and provides geopolitical safe-haven support for GC (+7) and 6J (+6). The secondary effect — energy-driven inflation — is now pushing the ECB toward hawkish territory (Bloomberg, March 9).

2. **Real Yields + NFP = Fed Cut Narrative Building:** The combination of falling real yields (DFII10 at 1.80%, down from 2.0% in January) and the shocking NFP -92,000 print (February 2026, vs +60,000 expected) is building a compelling case for Fed rate cuts later in 2026. With the FOMC meeting in 8 days (March 18-19), markets are watching for any dovish pivot in language. This theme is the structural bullish driver for gold (+7), tech (NQ +9), and small caps (RTY +5).

3. **BoJ-ECB Hawkish Divergence vs Fed Hold:** The Bank of Japan is on a clear hiking path (2-3 hikes in 2026, April hike ~60% probability) while the ECB has shifted hawkish on energy inflation (Bloomberg, March 9). Both central banks are diverging from the Fed's neutral hold stance. This creates rate differential tailwinds for JPY (6J +6) and EUR (M6E +2 upgrade), while the weak DXY (98.8, -4.92% YoY) provides a broad commodity and FX tailwind.

## Watch List

The **EIA Weekly Petroleum Status Report (March 11, 2026)** is the most critical near-term catalyst for CL — a second consecutive inventory build would test the supply shock narrative, but the Iranian oil facility strikes are expected to dominate. The **FOMC meeting (March 18-19, 2026)** will be watched for stagflation messaging — the Fed faces a dilemma with rising energy inflation (WTI $103) and a weakening labor market (NFP -92,000). The **BoJ meeting (March 18-19)** is expected to hold, but April hike probability is meaningful — any hawkish forward guidance would be JPY-positive. The **RBA meeting** carries a 33% probability of a March hike given Governor Bullock's hawkish signals. Any **Iran conflict escalation or ceasefire** remains the highest-impact wildcard for all instruments — a ceasefire would immediately reverse CL and partially reverse GC.
